default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy and content planning for AI roleplay software.](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift focus to bottom-of-funnel content, specifically competitor comparisons and alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Create templated blog posts for head-to-head platform comparisons (e.g., "Exec vs. Second Nature")](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [Prioritize direct roleplay competitors for comparison content](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [SEO analysis shows stable growth in sessions and engaged sessions, with opportunities in long-tail keywords](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)

## Topics

### Bottom-of-Funnel Content Strategy

  - [SERP undersaturated for competitor comparisons and alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Mixed intent in search results (homepages, blog posts)](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Opportunity to create blog posts outranking competitors](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [Focus on direct AI roleplay competitors rather than broad sales enablement platforms](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Template approach: platform vs. platform, alternatives, and three-platform comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)

### Content Creation Approach

  - [Create balanced, detailed comparisons of platforms](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
